DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-18-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Scott Emblidge, Esq., 415-362-3599, appearing for Darrell Taylor, Plaintiff and opposing party.

Mark Wilson, Esq., 415-400-0829, appearing for Greg Fulford, for Defendant and moving party.

Court Reporter: Kathryn Lloud. CSR: 5955. Telephone: 925-548-9114. Email: kathil58@comcast.net

Argued. Mr. Wilson argued the issue to notice and stated that parties have agreed to allow more time to answer.

The Court adopts a modified tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT GREG FULFORD, VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC. DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, unitl January 10, 2020 to answer. First Amended Complaint states sufficient facts to support all causes of action alleged against the moving defendants. Request for Judicial Notice is granted. Subject to review of the order. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, reported (D501)
